TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ci Sen-chou-zhi-zho(kamu nu Hulam: ś£ģšłĎšĻčŚä©) nay i 1877 a mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw enem a demiadan makatukuh i 1926 a mihcaan pituay a bulad sepatay a demiadan, nalecuhan i Dipun Jin-tu-wu-tiaw-si-ting u midesekay nu sicudaday a tademaw. nikaudipan ci Sen-chou-zhi-zho na nutawya tu micudad i Chang-chi misiwbayan a picudadan, i sabaw enem a mihcaan na malakuday sunuk sa miliyas tu luma', na nutawya sa malingatu mulakalak tacuwacuwa mininang ku nikaudip. i 1895 a mihcaan lima a bulad sa, na u mamuculilay a hitay mamibelinay a udip ku sakatayda i Taywan, i tida mikingkiw tu yincumin nu Taywan, kinapina tu musaliyuh tina Taywanay a subal muculil, mizizaw tu masadumaay a niyadu', nipicunusan tu sakatineng nu tademaway, sakatineng tu laylayay, nu nina'ay atu nu ukakay nu lutulutukay pasu nu makalalaay, mamin sinanuten nida a malacudad. sisa idaw ku sakasingangan tu nu Taywanay binacadan nu tademaway sikatineng (u malasatalakaway nu tumuk) a sakasenengan a ngangan. i 1900 a micaan, ci Sen-chou-zhi-zho atu ci Niyaw-ci-lung-cang i Taywanay a buyubuyu'an mikingkiw tu nu tademaway, mananunut maydih midademec tu mikayakay tu nadatengan, tusa a demiad nikadungdungan sikainayi' nu kakanan, sisa i nu dikudan, masaakaputay nu heni lakuwitan kya Ta-ta-cia-an , namakay nu ayawan a tadungduh atu nu etipan a tadungduh, i sepatay a bulad sabaw cacay a demiadan ya sananal katukuh han i satalakaway a buyu'. i 1915 a mihcaan lima a bulad sabaw pitu a demiadan, nu Bununay a binacadan ya tumuk ci Lahu Ali i mahida idaw ku tabakiay a kawaw, nu dikudan ci Sen-chou-zhi-zho pangiha amana kau nipipenec a maykuwan tu nu yincuminay sakaudip a kakawaw, pakunida han ku yincumin misakaku. i 1926 a mihcaan pitu a bulad, mikacaw tu balunga ya li-hu-wan, i teban nu bayu, i tini pituay a bulad sepatay a demiadan sikahedaw kadawidan, nu makayniay satalakaway nu mamikuwanay cinida tu ku kinapatayay mulebut sikahedih nu bayuan. nidaduyan a aca ci paseneng cinida i nu ayawan Taywanay a yincumin malasayaway mikingkiway a tademaw, ci paseneng cinidaan i Taywanay a binacadan malasayaway mamikingsaay a tademaw. ci i ulic nu (1925ŚĻī2śúą6śó•HSÁĒüŤ®ė) sabaw tulu: nadikudan, picaliwayan tuluay hakiya a demiadan, makatukuh kaku i Taypak. mala miulicay a labang cinida, aydaay nipiidang, yadah ku nipiedap kina taw i akuwan, nipicaliwayan miidang cinida tu ku paayaway, u duma sa, siwkay nida kaku tiya S mamikuwanay tu binacadan a tatapangan, uyni sa ci MśįŹ . u satedep sananay a manamuhay micudad a tademaw, i mahida hina tahekal caay katalaw tu nikadihan a tademaw, nakamuan, nipiadihan nida i nasubalan a binacadan, nayi' tu ku mikiayawan tu tineng i cinidaan, u duma ku sikatawid atu sakasikadan, uyda sa namizizaw mikingkiw cinida, caay kaidaw nipidikec tu sapatalaw tu mukin . nu masulitay tu a cudad nipatahekal katukuh i 2011 a mihcaan 10 a bulad 20 a demiadan nikatinengan: ,1994ŚĻī. u dumaay sapalucekan a tademaw: namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ś£ģšłĎšĻčŚä©
S.PHON: ¶i s…ôn- ¶ńßou-zńßi-zńßo(kamu nu ńßur~…ĺam: ****) naj i **** a mińß ¶aan ¶a ¶aj a bur~…ĺad sabaw …ôn…ôm a d…ômiadan makatukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan pituaj a bur~…ĺad s…ôpataj a d…ômiadan, nar~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i dipun *in-tu-wu-tiaw-si-tiŇč u mid…ôs…ôkaj nu si ¶udadaj a tad…ômaw. nikaudipan ¶i s…ôn- ¶ńßou-zńßi-zńßo na nutawja tu mi ¶udad i ¶ńßaŇč- ¶ńßi misiwbajan a pi ¶udadan, i sabaw …ôn…ôm a mińß ¶aan na mar~…ĺakudaj sunuk sa mir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, na nutawja sa mar~…ĺiŇčatu mur~…ĺakar~…ĺak ta ¶uwa ¶uwa mininaŇč ku nikaudip. i **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad sa, na u mamu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj a ńßitaj mamib…ôr~…ĺinaj a udip ku sakatajda i tajwan, i tida mikiŇčkiw tu jin ¶umin nu tajwan, kinapina tu musar~…ĺijuńß tina tajwanaj a subar~…ĺ mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, mizizaw tu masadumaaj a nijadu Ē~ °, nipi ¶unusan tu sakatin…ôŇč nu tad…ômawaj, sakatin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺajaj, nu nina Ē~ °aj atu nu ukakaj nu r~…ĺutur~…ĺutukaj pasu nu makar~…ĺar~…ĺaaj, mamin sinanut…ôn nida a mar~…ĺa ¶udad. sisa idaw ku sakasiŇčaŇčan tu nu tajwanaj bina ¶adan nu tad…ômawaj sikatin…ôŇč (u mar~…ĺasatar~…ĺakawaj nu tumuk) a sakas…ôn…ôŇčan a ŇčaŇčan. i **** a mi ¶aan, ¶i s…ôn- ¶ńßou-zńßi-zńßo atu ¶i nijaw- ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶aŇč i tajwanaj a bujubuju Ē~ °an mikiŇčkiw tu nu tad…ômawaj, mananunut majdińß midad…ôm…ô ¶ tu mikajakaj tu nadat…ôŇčan, tusa a d…ômiad nikaduŇčduŇčan sikainaji Ē~ ° nu kakanan, sisa i nu dikudan, masaakaputaj nu ńß…ôni r~…ĺakuwitan kja ta-ta- ¶ia-an , namakaj nu ajawan a taduŇčduńß atu nu …ôtipan a taduŇčduńß, i s…ôpataj a bur~…ĺad sabaw ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiadan ja sananar~…ĺ katukuńß ńßan i satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °. i **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad sabaw pitu a d…ômiadan, nu bununaj a bina ¶adan ja tumuk ¶i r~…ĺańßu ar~…ĺi i mańßida idaw ku tabakiaj a kawaw, nu dikudan ¶i s…ôn- ¶ńßou-zńßi-zńßo paŇčińßa amana kau nipip…ôn…ô ¶ a majkuwan tu nu jin ¶uminaj sakaudip a kakawaw, pakunida ńßan ku jin ¶umin misakaku. i **** a mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad, mika ¶aw tu bar~…ĺuŇča ja r~…ĺi-ńßu-wan, i t…ôban nu baju, i tini pituaj a bur~…ĺad s…ôpataj a d…ômiadan sikańß…ôdaw kadawidan, nu makajniaj satar~…ĺakawaj nu mamikuwanaj ¶inida tu ku kinapatajaj mur~…ĺ…ôbut sikańß…ôdińß nu bajuan. nidadujan a a ¶a ¶i pas…ôn…ôŇč ¶inida i nu ajawan tajwanaj a jin ¶umin mar~…ĺasajawaj mikiŇčkiwaj a tad…ômaw, ¶i pas…ôn…ôŇč ¶inidaan i tajwanaj a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺasajawaj mamikiŇčsaaj a tad…ômaw. ¶i i ur~…ĺi ¶ nu (*********ńßs**) sabaw tur~…ĺu: nadikudan, pi ¶ar~…ĺiwajan tur~…ĺuaj ńßakija a d…ômiadan, makatukuńß kaku i tajpak. mar~…ĺa miur~…ĺi ¶aj a r~…ĺabaŇč ¶inida, ajdaaj nipiidaŇč, jadańß ku nipi…ôdap kina taw i akuwan, nipi ¶ar~…ĺiwajan miidaŇč ¶inida tu ku paajawaj, u duma sa, siwkaj nida kaku tija s mamikuwanaj tu bina ¶adan a tatapaŇčan, ujni sa ¶i m* . u sat…ôd…ôp sananaj a manamuńßaj mi ¶udad a tad…ômaw, i mańßida ńßina tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu nikadińßan a tad…ômaw, nakamuan, nipiadińßan nida i nasubar~…ĺan a bina ¶adan, naji Ē~ ° tu ku mikiajawan tu tin…ôŇč i ¶inidaan, u duma ku sikatawid atu sakasikadan, ujda sa namizizaw mikiŇčkiw ¶inida, ¶aaj kaidaw nipidik…ô ¶ tu sapatar~…ĺaw tu mukin . nu masur~…ĺitaj tu a ¶udad nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiadan nikatin…ôŇčan: ,*****. u dumaaj sapar~…ĺu ¶…ôkan a tad…ômaw: namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan ****
S.FORM: ci Sen-chou-zhi-zho(kamu nu Hulam: ś£ģšłĎšĻčŚä©) nay i 1877 a mihcaan cacay a bulad sabaw enem a demiadan makatukuh i 1926 a mihcaan pituay a bulad sepatay a demiadan, nalecuhan i Dipun Jin-tu-wu-tiaw-si-ting u midesekay nu sicudaday a tademaw. nikaudipan ci Sen-chou-zhi-zho na nutawya tu micudad i Chang-chi misiwbayan a picudadan, i sabaw enem a mihcaan na malakuday sunuk sa miliyas tu luma', na nutawya sa malingatu mulakalak tacuwacuwa mininang ku nikaudip. i 1895 a mihcaan lima a bulad sa, na u mamuculilay a hitay mamibelinay a udip ku sakatayda i Taywan, i tida mikingkiw tu yincumin nu Taywan, kinapina tu musaliyuh tina Taywanay a subal muculil, mizizaw tu masadumaay a niyadu', nipicunusan tu sakatineng nu tademaway, sakatineng tu laylayay, nu nina'ay atu nu ukakay nu lutulutukay pasu nu makalalaay, mamin sinanuten nida a malacudad. sisa idaw ku sakasingangan tu nu Taywanay binacadan nu tademaway sikatineng (u malasatalakaway nu tumuk) a sakasenengan a ngangan. i 1900 a micaan, ci Sen-chou-zhi-zho atu ci Niyaw-ci-lung-cang i Taywanay a buyubuyu'an mikingkiw tu nu tademaway, mananunut maydih midademec tu mikayakay tu nadatengan, tusa a demiad nikadungdungan sikainayi' nu kakanan, sisa i nu dikudan, masaakaputay nu heni lakuwitan kya Ta-ta-cia-an , namakay nu ayawan a tadungduh atu nu etipan a tadungduh, i sepatay a bulad sabaw cacay a demiadan ya sananal katukuh han i satalakaway a buyu'. i 1915 a mihcaan lima a bulad sabaw pitu a demiadan, nu Bununay a binacadan ya tumuk ci Lahu Ali i mahida idaw ku tabakiay a kawaw, nu dikudan ci Sen-chou-zhi-zho pangiha amana kau nipipenec a maykuwan tu nu yincuminay sakaudip a kakawaw, pakunida han ku yincumin misakaku. i 1926 a mihcaan pitu a bulad, mikacaw tu balunga ya li-hu-wan, i teban nu bayu, i tini pituay a bulad sepatay a demiadan sikahedaw kadawidan, nu makayniay satalakaway nu mamikuwanay cinida tu ku kinapatayay mulebut sikahedih nu bayuan. nidaduyan a aca ci paseneng cinida i nu ayawan Taywanay a yincumin malasayaway mikingkiway a tademaw, ci paseneng cinidaan i Taywanay a binacadan malasayaway mamikingsaay a tademaw. ci i ulic nu (1925ŚĻī2śúą6śó•HSÁĒüŤ®ė) sabaw tulu: nadikudan, picaliwayan tuluay hakiya a demiadan, makatukuh kaku i Taypak. mala miulicay a labang cinida, aydaay nipiidang, yadah ku nipiedap kina taw i akuwan, nipicaliwayan miidang cinida tu ku paayaway, u duma sa, siwkay nida kaku tiya S mamikuwanay tu binacadan a tatapangan, uyni sa ci MśįŹ . u satedep sananay a manamuhay micudad a tademaw, i mahida hina tahekal caay katalaw tu nikadihan a tademaw, nakamuan, nipiadihan nida i nasubalan a binacadan, nayi' tu ku mikiayawan tu tineng i cinidaan, u duma ku sikatawid atu sakasikadan, uyda sa namizizaw mikingkiw cinida, caay kaidaw nipidikec tu sapatalaw tu mukin . nu masulitay tu a cudad nipatahekal katukuh i 2011 a mihcaan 10 a bulad 20 a demiadan nikatinengan: ,1994ŚĻī. u dumaay sapalucekan a tademaw: namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ś£ģšłĎšĻčŚä©

nijadu Ē~ °, nipi ¶unusan tu sakatin…ôŇč nu tad…ômawaj, sakatin…ôŇč tu r~…ĺajr~…ĺajaj, nu nina Ē~ °aj atu nu ukakaj nu r~…ĺutur~…ĺutukaj pasu nu makar~…ĺar~…ĺaaj, mamin sinanut…ôn nida a mar~…ĺa ¶udad. sisa idaw ku sakasiŇčaŇčan tu nu tajwanaj bina ¶adan nu tad…ômawaj sikatin…ôŇč (u mar~…ĺasatar~…ĺakawaj nu tumuk) a sakas…ôn…ôŇčan a ŇčaŇčan. i **** a mi ¶aan, ¶i s…ôn- ¶ńßou-zńßi-zńßo atu ¶i nijaw- ¶i-r~…ĺuŇč- ¶aŇč i tajwanaj a bujubuju Ē~ °an mikiŇčkiw tu nu tad…ômawaj, mananunut majdińß midad…ôm…ô ¶ tu mikajakaj tu nadat…ôŇčan, tusa a d…ômiad nikaduŇčduŇčan sikainaji Ē~ ° nu kakanan, sisa i nu dikudan, masaakaputaj nu ńß…ôni r~…ĺakuwitan kja ta-ta- ¶ia-an , namakaj nu ajawan a taduŇčduńß atu nu …ôtipan a taduŇčduńß, i s…ôpataj a bur~…ĺad sabaw ¶a ¶aj a d…ômiadan ja sananar~…ĺ katukuńß ńßan i satar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ °. i **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺima a bur~…ĺad sabaw pitu a d…ômiadan, nu bununaj a bina ¶adan ja tumuk ¶i r~…ĺańßu ar~…ĺi i mańßida idaw ku tabakiaj a kawaw, nu dikudan ¶i s…ôn- ¶ńßou-zńßi-zńßo paŇčińßa amana kau nipip…ôn…ô ¶ a majkuwan tu nu jin ¶uminaj sakaudip a kakawaw, pakunida ńßan ku jin ¶umin misakaku. i **** a mińß ¶aan pitu a bur~…ĺad, mika ¶aw tu bar~…ĺuŇča ja r~…ĺi-ńßu-wan, i t…ôban nu baju, i tini pituaj a bur~…ĺad s…ôpataj a d…ômiadan sikańß…ôdaw kadawidan, nu makajniaj satar~…ĺakawaj nu mamikuwanaj ¶inida tu ku kinapatajaj mur~…ĺ…ôbut sikańß…ôdińß nu bajuan. nidadujan a a ¶a ¶i pas…ôn…ôŇč ¶inida i nu ajawan tajwanaj a jin ¶umin mar~…ĺasajawaj mikiŇčkiwaj a tad…ômaw, ¶i pas…ôn…ôŇč ¶inidaan i tajwanaj a bina ¶adan mar~…ĺasajawaj mamikiŇčsaaj a tad…ômaw. ¶i i ur~…ĺi ¶ nu (*********ńßs**) sabaw tur~…ĺu: nadikudan, pi ¶ar~…ĺiwajan tur~…ĺuaj ńßakija a d…ômiadan, makatukuńß kaku i tajpak. mar~…ĺa miur~…ĺi ¶aj a r~…ĺabaŇč ¶inida, ajdaaj nipiidaŇč, jadańß ku nipi…ôdap kina taw i akuwan, nipi ¶ar~…ĺiwajan miidaŇč ¶inida tu ku paajawaj, u duma sa, siwkaj nida kaku tija s mamikuwanaj tu bina ¶adan a tatapaŇčan, ujni sa ¶i m* . u sat…ôd…ôp sananaj a manamuńßaj mi ¶udad a tad…ômaw, i mańßida ńßina tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶aaj katar~…ĺaw tu nikadińßan a tad…ômaw, nakamuan, nipiadińßan nida i nasubar~…ĺan a bina ¶adan, naji Ē~ ° tu ku mikiajawan tu tin…ôŇč i ¶inidaan, u duma ku sikatawid atu sakasikadan, ujda sa namizizaw mikiŇčkiw ¶inida, ¶aaj kaidaw nipidik…ô ¶ tu sapatar~…ĺaw tu mukin . nu masur~…ĺitaj tu a ¶udad nipatańß…ôkar~…ĺ katukuńß i **** a mińß ¶aan ** a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiadan nikatin…ôŇčan: ,*****. u dumaaj sapar~…ĺu ¶…ôkan a tad…ômaw: namakajniaj a nasur~…ĺitan nasakamuan atu natin…ôŇčan ****
